introSection: Abandoned Mine was a kiddie roller coaster previously located at Uncle Bernie's Amusement Park in Fort Laurderadale, Florida, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a simple oval layout.

fullText:
Abandoned Mine was a kiddie roller coaster previously located at Uncle Bernie's Amusement Park in Fort Laurderadale, Florida, USA.

The ride had a simple oval layout.
